understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by positioning every selectable piece (P or S) onto a distinct goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level's grid to achieve WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece (P) by 3 pixels per cell in the specified direction unless blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; pushable blocks (B) can be shoved if adjacent; CLICK switches selection to another selectable (S) at the exact target_position coordinates without moving it; multiple selectables require individual positioning on goals, and heuristics like movement.blocked provide hints but actions must be tested empirically.
